# Project Title

Some introductory text about the project.

## Installation

```bash
npm install my-package
```

### Prerequisites

- Node.js 18+
- npm 9+

## Usage

```javascript
import { foo } from 'my-package';
foo();
```

### API Reference

#### `foo(options)`

Does something useful.

#### `bar(x, y)`

Does something else.

## Contributing

Please read CONTRIBUTING.md before submitting PRs.

### Code Style

We use prettier and eslint.
